Description

  • Uses of Decimal in com.saperion.common.config.manager

    Methods in com.saperion.common.config.manager that return Decimal
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    final Decimal
    DbConfigurationManager.getDecimal(HierarchicalName hierarchicalName)
    Gets the configuration value with the specified HierarchicalName and converts it to a Decimal.
    final Decimal
    DbConfigurationManager.getDecimal(HierarchicalName hierarchicalName, StorageType storageType)
    Gets the configuration value with the specified HierarchicalName and converts it to a Decimal.

  • Uses of Decimal in com.saperion.common.lang.datatype

    Methods in com.saperion.common.lang.datatype that return Decimal
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    final Decimal
    Decimal.enlargeScale(int targetScale)
    Creates and returns a new Decimal with the same numerical value but with the specified increased scale and an increased precision.
    static Decimal
    Decimal.fromBigDecimal(BigDecimal value)
    Creates a new Decimal with the content of the specified BigDecimal.
    static Decimal
    Decimal.fromDouble(double value)
    Creates a new Decimal with the content of the specified double.
    static Decimal
    Decimal.fromLong(long value)
    Creates a new Decimal with the content of the specified long.
    static Decimal
    Decimal.fromString(String string)
    Creates a new Decimal with the content of the specified String with the natural scale.
    static Decimal
    Decimal.fromString(String string, int targetScale)
    Creates a new Decimal with the content of the specified String and the specified target scale.
